examples: Perhaps Kipling would say, "Let the jaguar grow melanin."
Most people don't tan after just one day at the beach, or one session in the tanning bed, because it takes time to make melanin.
Melanin also plays a role in the development of certain optical nerves.
Albinism reveals itself through a lack of melanin or coloring in the skin, hair and eyes.
Dark feathers contain the pigment melanin, which protects feathers against the damaging effects of abrasion and UV radiation.
